Describe the problem in one or two sentences.

Describe what you expected to happen.

Describe what actually happened.

## Logs or Screenshots

Paste any relevant logs, stack traces, SSE event snippets, or screenshots here.

## Additional Context

Include anything else that might help narrow the issue down.
